---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Binimetinib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Binimetinib</strong> 目前有 <strong>12 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Binimetinib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：MelanomaBinimetinib in combination with encorafenib is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with unresectable or metastatic melanoma with a BRAF V600 mutation.Non-small cell lung cancer...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>metastatic melanoma（99.1%）</li>
<li>choroideremia（98.6%）</li>
<li>non-cutaneous melanoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>epithelioid cell melanoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>eyelid melanoma（98.5%）</li>
<li>scrotum melanoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>malignant melanoma of the mucosa（98.2%）</li>
<li>nodular malignant melanoma（98.2%）</li>
<li>superficial spreading melanoma（98.2%）</li>
<li>lentigo maligna melanoma（98.2%）</li>
<li>amelanotic skin melanoma（98.2%）</li>
<li>acral lentiginous melanoma (disease)（98.2%）</li>
<li>balloon cell malignant melanoma（98.2%）</li>
<li>CDK4 linked melanoma（98.2%）</li>
<li>choroidal dystrophy, central areolar（98.2%）</li>
<li>intestinal obstruction in the newborn due to guanylate cyclase 2C deficiency（98.0%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis（91.8%）</li>
<li>bilateral parasagittal parieto-occipital polymicrogyria（91.7%）</li>
<li>Mills syndrome（91.0%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, susceptibility to（90.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/binimetinib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
